changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Seed 50+ investor contacts for GTM launch. Organized by tier: A (warm/strategic), B (qualified), C (broad outreach). Categories: VC, Angel, Strategic, Advisor. All contacts researched for healthcare IT / interoperability focus.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former Kyruus CEO. Deep healthcare IT expertise. Led Veracyte, Devoted Health investments. Focuses on tech-enabled healthcare services, data infrastructure.

column.name: notes
column.value: Perfect fit: interoperability, quality measures, value-based care. A16z Bio has $4.5B AUM.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Stanford professor, founded Folding@home. Computational biology focus. Investments in Freenome, Insitro.

column.name: notes
column.value: Data-heavy healthcare thesis aligns with CQL/HEDIS platform.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: MD, leads health investments at GV. Invested in Flatiron (acquired by Roche), Clover Health, Oscar. Focus on healthcare data and analytics.

column.name: notes
column.value: GV has deep Google Health connections. Data infrastructure play.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former Obama healthcare policy advisor, McKinsey partner. Architect of ACA provisions. Invested in Aledade, Lyra Health. Value-based care expert.

column.name: notes
column.value: CRITICAL: Designed many VBC payment models we support. Perfect policy + tech alignment.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare and life sciences focus. Board: Illumina. Investments in healthcare IT infrastructure.

column.name: notes
column.value: Long track record in healthcare data companies.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former Oak Investment Partners. Founded Oak HC/FT focused exclusively on healthcare IT and fintech. Investments in Devoted Health, CarePort.

column.name: notes
column.value: Oak HC/FT is #1 healthcare IT focused fund. Perfect alignment.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Focus on healthcare IT infrastructure, interoperability. Investments in Particle Health (data network), Verato (identity).

column.name: notes
column.value: CRITICAL: Invested in Particle Health (competitor). Knows space intimately.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Author 'UnHealthcare'. Led GC Health initiative. Investments in Livongo, Commure, Transcarent. Focus on healthcare transformation.

column.name: notes
column.value: GC Health is major healthcare vertical. Commure is interoperability play.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former SVP at Syros Pharma. Focus on computational biology and healthcare data. Investments in Freenome, Insitro.

column.name: notes
column.value: Biology + data thesis. Could see HDIM as clinical intelligence platform.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare IT specialist. Co-founded Flare to focus exclusively on healthcare IT. Former IDG Ventures. Investments in Arcadia, Buoy Health.

column.name: notes
column.value: Arcadia is quality/analytics competitor. Knows our space deeply.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Venture Valkyrie blog. Former GE Ventures. Deep healthcare investing experience. Now Manatt Health advisory.

column.name: notes
column.value: Industry influencer. Could provide intros to multiple VCs.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare investor at Bessemer. Investments in Bright Health, Hims, Accolade. Focus on tech-enabled healthcare.

column.name: notes
column.value: Bessemer is top-tier. Healthcare vertical well-funded.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare IT focused fund. Former Rock Health. Focus on digital health infrastructure.

column.name: notes
column.value: Define focuses on seed/Series A healthcare IT.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Corporate VC arm of Merck. Focus on healthcare IT, data analytics, value-based care enablement.

column.name: notes
column.value: Strategic value: Merck pharma data needs quality measure integration.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former Allscripts CEO, Livongo founder. Active angel investor in healthcare IT. Deep EHR and interoperability expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: CRITICAL: EHR pioneer. Would understand FHIR/CQL value prop immediately.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Founded Rock Health, leading digital health accelerator. Now active angel and advisor. Deep network across healthcare.

column.name: notes
column.value: Great for intros. Rock Health alumni network is strong.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Focus on 'tough tech' including healthcare infrastructure. Former Lux Capital.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare-only fund. Former J&J executive. Focus on digital health infrastructure and analytics.

column.name: notes
column.value: Define is healthcare-focused. Seed to Series A sweet spot.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Out of Pocket Health newsletter (50K+ subscribers). Healthcare analyst turned investor. Deep knowledge of healthcare IT landscape.

column.name: notes
column.value: Great content creator. Building relationship could yield PR + investment.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare IT and AI focused fund. Investments in Regard, Innovaccer.

column.name: notes
column.value: Innovaccer is competitor. Understands data aggregation space.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare-only fund from 7wire founders. Focus on connected consumer health and data.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former HHS official, founded Avalere. Deep policy and quality measure expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: Avalere does quality consulting. Would understand HEDIS value immediately.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Leads Walmart Health strategy. Walmart expanding into VBC, needs quality infrastructure.

column.name: notes
column.value: Strategic angle: Walmart Health Clinics need HEDIS reporting.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Healthcare strategy consultant. Former BCG. Advises health systems on VBC transformation.

column.name: notes
column.value: Could introduce to health system clients who need HDIM.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: UnitedHealth corporate VC. Focus on healthcare IT and services. Large check sizes.

column.name: notes
column.value: UHC is largest payer. Strategic value enormous but regulatory considerations.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: US National Coordinator for Health IT. Former MA eHealth Collaborative. FHIR policy architect.

column.name: notes
column.value: Government connection. Can provide policy insights, not investment.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former US CTO. Founded CareJourney (analytics). Deep interoperability and policy expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: CareJourney is adjacent. Could be advisor or intro path.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Founded 7wire. Former Allscripts CFO. Healthcare IT infrastructure focus.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former CNBC health tech reporter. Deep industry knowledge and network.

column.name: notes
column.value: Media connection could help with PR as well as investment.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Lark CEO. AI-powered chronic care management. Active angel in health tech.

column.name: notes
column.value: Chronic care management connects to HEDIS measures.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former ONC Coordinator, founded Aledade (ACO enablement). Deep quality measure expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: Aledade is potential customer or partner. Uses quality measures heavily.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Oscar Health co-founder. Tech-first health insurance. Needs quality measure infrastructure.

column.name: notes
column.value: Oscar could be customer + investor. MA quality star ratings critical for them.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Komodo CEO. Healthcare data platform. Former FDA. Deep data analytics expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: Komodo is adjacent. Could be partnership angle.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Leads connected health at HIMSS. Deep interoperability expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: HIMSS connection for conferences and credibility.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: USV partner. Focus on large network effects. Invested in Human Dx.

column.name: notes
column.value: Healthcare not primary focus but has made health investments.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Maven Clinic founder. Women's health focus. Active in health tech community.

column.name: notes
column.value: Women's health adjacent but not core quality measure user.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Obvious Ventures. Focus on 'world positive' investments including health.

column.name: notes
column.value: Impact investing angle. Cost savings + patient outcomes story.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Lux Capital partner. Healthcare and frontier tech. Former GV.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Doximity founder. Physician network. Active angel investor.

column.name: notes
column.value: Physician network could be distribution channel.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: athenahealth founder, now Zus Health (healthcare data). Active angel investor.

column.name: notes
column.value: Zus is interoperability company. Could be partner or competitor.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Clover Health founder. MA plan with tech focus. Star ratings are critical.

column.name: notes
column.value: Clover uses quality measures. Could be customer + investor.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: MD at a16z Bio. Focus on computational approaches to healthcare.

column.name: notes
column.value: Newer partner. Could be entry point to a16z team.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Khosla Ventures founder. Healthcare investments include Oscar, Forward. Big vision investor.

column.name: notes
column.value: Swing for fences investor. Needs big vision story.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Internet Trends analyst. Bond Capital. Healthcare investments include Devoted Health.

column.name: notes
column.value: Huge credibility. Later stage but could do earlier.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: KPCB partner, MD. Focus on life sciences and healthcare.

column.name: notes
column.value: More biopharma focused but has done healthcare IT.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former DFJ. Enterprise SaaS focus with some healthcare.

column.name: notes
column.value: Enterprise SaaS angle. B2B healthcare IT fits.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: a16z co-founder. Enterprise and infrastructure focus. Defers healthcare to Bio team.

column.name: notes
column.value: Entry to a16z. Would likely pass to Julie Yoo.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Former Founders Fund. Solo GP. Eclectic portfolio including health.

column.name: notes
column.value: Smaller fund, faster decisions. Worth a shot.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Benchmark partner. Consumer and marketplace focus. Some health investments.

column.name: notes
column.value: Not primary healthcare investor but Benchmark is tier-1.

column.name: investment_thesis
column.value: Redpoint founding partner. Enterprise SaaS focus.
